mapper.select: SELECT compatibility_status FROM post_processing_print_uv WHERE company_number = #{companyNumber} AND (paper_type IS NULL OR paper_type = '' OR paper_type = #{paperType}) AND ( -- 匹配1: product_model_number（优先级高） (product_model_number = #{productModelNumber} AND product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND product_model_number != '') OR -- 匹配2: product_name（优先级低） (product_name = #{productName} AND product_name IS NOT NULL AND product_name != '') ) ORDER BY -- 优先级排序：越精确的匹配越靠前 CASE WHEN product_model_number = #{productModelNumber} AND product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND product_model_number != '' THEN 1 WHEN product_name = #{productName} AND product_name IS NOT NULL AND product_name != '' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END LIMIT 1

SELECT id, product_name, product_model_number, company_number, compatibility_status, paper_type, notice_ids, created_at, updated_at FROM post_processing_print_uv ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number, company_number

SELECT id, product_name, product_model_number, company_number, compatibility_status, paper_type, notice_ids, created_at, updated_at FROM post_processing_print_uv ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number, company_number LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_processing_print_uv ( product_name, product_model_number, company_number, compatibility_status, paper_type, notice_ids, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{productModelNumber}, #{companyNumber}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{paperType}, #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE post_processing_print_uv SET product_name = #{productName}, product_model_number = #{productModelNumber}, company_number = #{companyNumber}, compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, paper_type = #{paperType}, notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name, product_model_number, company_number, compatibility_status, paper_type, notice_ids, created_at, updated_at FROM post_processing_print_uv WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, product_name, product_model_number, company_number, compatibility_status, paper_type, created_at, updated_at FROM post_processing_print_uv WHERE product_name = #{productName} ORDER BY product_model_number, company_number

SELECT id, product_name, product_model_number, company_number, compatibility_status, paper_type, created_at, updated_at FROM post_processing_print_uv WHERE product_model_number = #{productModelNumber} ORDER BY product_name, company_number

SELECT id, product_name, product_model_number, company_number, compatibility_status, paper_type, created_at, updated_at FROM post_processing_print_uv WHERE company_number = #{companyNumber} ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number

SELECT id, product_name, product_model_number, company_number, compatibility_status, paper_type, created_at, updated_at FROM post_processing_print_uv WHERE paper_type = #{paperType} ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number, company_number
SELECT DISTINCT product_name FROM post_processing_print_uv WHERE product_name IS NOT NULL AND product_name != '' ORDER BY product_name
SELECT DISTINCT product_model_number FROM post_processing_print_uv WHERE product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND product_model_number != '' ORDER BY product_model_number
SELECT DISTINCT company_number FROM post_processing_print_uv WHERE company_number IS NOT NULL AND company_number != '' ORDER BY company_number
SELECT DISTINCT paper_type FROM post_processing_print_uv WHERE paper_type IS NOT NULL AND paper_type != '' ORDER BY paper_type
mapper.update:
UPDATE post_processing_print_uv SET compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT unnest(notice_ids) FROM post_processing_print_uv WHERE notice_ids IS NOT NULL AND array_length(notice_ids, 1) > 0 AND compatibility_status IN ('V', '▷')
AND company_number = #{companyNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE post_processing_print_uv SET notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
